[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010111 5
1 0011110 4
2 0001001 2
3 0000000 a
4 1001000 2
5 0101001 3
6 1011001 4
7 0111001 4

01 10 0001000 1
12 21 0001001 2 match 2
23 32 0011001 3
34 43 0101000 2
45 54 1000010 2
56 65 0010110 3
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0001000 1

02 20 1001000 2 match 4
13 31 0101001 3 match 5
24 42 1001000 2 match 4
35 53 0010001 2
46 64 0001010 2
57 75 0000001 1
60 06 0001000 1
71 17 0001001 2 match 2

03 30 0001000 1
14 41 0101000 2
25 52 1010001 3
36 63 0011000 2
47 74 0001000 1
50 05 1000000 1
61 16 0001000 1
72 27 0001001 2 match 2

04 40 1001000 2 match 4
15 51 0000001 1
26 62 0011000 2
37 73 0001001 2 match 2
[completion]
